title: Rockingham Forge Essentials 8007 Range Lightweight Stainless Steel 5” Utility Knife with Black Handle, Individually Carded (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

HANDLE A VARIETY OF TASKS – Maintain excellent control and manoeuvrability in any task with the utility knife – it’s indispensable for every day cooking and its durability ensures long lasting performance.

HIGH QUALITY MATERIALS: The blades are made from high quality, durable stainless steel which is a popular choice among home cooks and professional chefs due to its durability, rust resistance, low maintenance and sharpness.
COMFORTABLE HANDLE: The contemporary plastic handles have been ergonomically designed for better grip and comfort during use, reducing wrist strain, especially during extended cooking sessions.
AFFORDABLE, EVERYDAY KITCHEN KNIVES: The Rockingham Forge Essentials Range provides a range of reliable and stylish kitchen knives, suitable for daily use and without breaking the bank.
DISHWASHER-SAFE: The high quality stainless steel blades ensure they remain sharp and rust-free even after numerous wash cycles – a great time saver for busy households.

THE RIGHT KNIFE FOR ANY TASK: Choose from our extensive RF Essentials collection: 9cm Paring Knife, 12.5cm Utility Knife, 12.5cm Serrated Utility Knife, 15cm Boning Knife, 15cm Filleting Knife, 17.5cm Nakiri Knife, 17.5cm Santoku Knife, 20cm Bread Knife, 20cm Chef's Knife, 20cm Carving Knife.

DESIGNED IN SHEFFIELD: Rockingham Forge are located in Sheffield and have been operating since 1945. All of our knives are designed in house and use the same engineering as traditional 'made in Sheffield' knives to ensure high quality designs.
description: From the manufacturer Experience high quality knives without breaking the bank... The Essentials Collection provides cutting edge design and quality for every day use with a focus on value and affordability. Why choose Rockingham Forge Essentials knives? Rust resistant Are you tired of having to decide between affordability and quality? RF Essentials a strong focus on value and affordability without compromising on cutting edge design and quality. Dishwasher safe Do you hate spending ages washing up? RF Essentials' knives are all dishwasher safe which is a great time saver for busy households. The high quality stainless steel blades ensure they remain sharp and rust-free even after numerous wash cycles. Long lasting sharpness Are you putting up with blunt knives that make cooking a chore? RF Essentials' high quality stainless steel blades means your knives will stay sharper for longer. Bring the joy back to your cooking with effortless cutting. Ergonomic design Do you want to reduce strain on your hands as well as the risk of dropping your knives? RF Essentials' handles have been ergonomically designed for a comfortable grip that reduces fatigue and strain. The right knife for any task with RF Essentials Choose from 10 different varieties of knife to complete your collection and accomplish any kitchen task. Having the right knife for the task is crucial for any home cook or professional chef looking to enhance their culinary skills and efficiency in the kitchen. Rockingham Forge A brand steeped in tradition British design in the heart of Sheffield's steel country. Rockingham Forge takes the history of Sheffield knife making and incorporates the materials and manufacturing techniques into modern designs. Steel City Manufacturing Since 1948 I Grunwerg Ltd have proudly manufactures knives and scissors in the heart of Sheffield, the steel city and the centre of cutlery production in the UK. Whilst the factory closed in the 1970's the business moved to Rockingham Street, where it remained until 2019, designing and supplying cutlery and kitchen knives. Rockingham Forge Ranges Our Rockingham Forge ranges feature many different knife designs. RF Essentials provides cutting edge design and quality for everyday use, with a focus on value. RF Equilibrium is a heavy forged knife range with perfect balance and weight. Our Ashwood series combines renewable materials into an eco knife range. We also have excellent sharpeners to keep your knives in top condition. RF Essentials Cutting edge design and quality Everyday use in home and professional kitchens Focus on value and affordability High quality, durable stainless steel blades Ergonomically designed for comfortable use Dishwasher safe
